topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is a strong page-level opportunity because the existing event guide already matches the cluster, the route is clear, and the GSC signal suggests meaningful visibility with moderate CTR room. It is suitable for a scoped update rather than new content. Prior run `2026-05-10-alliance-duel-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Better match for last z vs schedule intent, faster access to schedule and day-by-day strategy, and improved first-screen usefulness.
topics.duplication_risk: Low, because the proposal targets an existing canonical event page and the cluster role is already established.
claims_to_verify: Whether alliance-duel.html is still the best canonical page for the target query set.
Whether the proposed schedule and day 1-6 plan fit existing page scope without expanding into a broader events hub.
Whether any schedule or strategy claims need fresh owner confirmation before a proposal is drafted.
topics.next_step: Have an editor confirm query intent, compare the page against the current canonical event guide, and define a scoped update that preserves cluster separation.
evidence: GSC page signal: alliance-duel.html had 8912 impressions, 434 clicks, 4.87% CTR, avg position 6.10.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z vs schedule` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `event-guide` in the `Events` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner approved exact Alliance Duel schedule/content intent changes. Manual apply was used for first-screen/meta operations, followed by strict QA.

topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is the strongest opportunity in the set because the page has large impression volume, low CTR signals on multiple gift center queries, and an existing backlog history that suggests prior optimization work. The page is clearly canonical for redeem codes and gift center intent, but the update must preserve protected claims and cluster separation. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Cleaner path to redeem codes, gift center login, and UID guidance with less friction for searchers who need quick action.
topics.duplication_risk: Low to medium, because the topic overlaps the existing cornerstone guide and must avoid creating a competing page intent.
claims_to_verify: Whether the current page still owns the primary redeem and gift center intent.
Whether protected canonical claims remain accurate and unchanged.
Whether any mention of login, UID, or redeem flow needs direct owner validation before an apply step.
topics.next_step: Have a human reviewer verify that the page can be improved without changing protected claims or blurring roles with any gift center support page.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 40033 impressions, 733 clicks, 1.83% CTR, avg position 6.01.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3169 impressions, 121 clicks, 3.82% CTR, position 6.58.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 903 impressions, 46 clicks, 5.09% CTR, position 5.14.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 683 impressions, 29 clicks, 4.25% CTR, position 5.96.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 508 impressions, 25 clicks, 4.92% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

topics.duplication_risk: Medium, because the topic may overlap existing gift center coverage and could duplicate current support intent if not scoped carefully.
claims_to_verify: Whether the official site confirms the same Gift Center routing currently described on the site.
Whether UID and store flow instructions align with owner-confirmed knowledge.
Whether the topic adds a distinct player job beyond existing gift center coverage.
